name: Direct Voltage (No Probe)
description: No conversion. Scope voltage is plotted as dBuV.

name: 50 Ohm LISN / Transimpedance
description: Converts scope dBuV to dBuA using 50 ohm transimpedance.

name: 5 Ohm Current Probe
description: Converts scope dBuV to dBuA using 5 ohm transimpedance.

name: E-Field Probe (26 dB/m)
description: Example antenna factor of 26.0206 dB/m. Replace with the probe calibration table.

name: E-Field Probe (40 dB/m)
description: Example antenna factor of 40 dB/m. Replace with the probe calibration table.

name: E-Field Probe (Placeholder)
description: Placeholder electric-field probe. Update with calibrated antenna factors in dB/m.
